response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning well with the role’s AI-native engineering focus. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and cross-functional collaboration history show excellent stakeholder and agile alignment. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Python mastery and on-call incident response, but his breadth of systems work compensates.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Extensive distributed systems background with high-throughput, low-latency systems (e.g., DLang microservices, millions of requests/sec)
Strong operational ownership evidenced by open-source platform maintenance, CI/CD setup, and full-stack ownership
concerns: Python expertise is implied but not explicitly detailed in resume
No clear mention of formal on-call or incident-response responsibilities
German language skill is basic, though role is Berlin-based with English as primary
